results.question: Which payment method has the highest total revenue?
results.reference_sql: SELECT payment_method, ROUND(SUM(total_amount), 2) AS total_revenue FROM ecommerce.orders GROUP BY payment_method ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 1
results.generated_sql:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT 
    payment_method, 
    SUM(total_amount) AS revenue,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(total_amount) DESC) AS rnk
  FROM ecommerce.orders
  WHERE status <> 'cancelled'
  GROUP BY payment_method
)
SELECT 
  payment_method, 
  ROUND(revenue, 2) AS revenue
FROM ranked
WHERE rnk = 1

runs_detail.generated_sql:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT 
    payment_method, 
    SUM(total_amount) AS revenue,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(total_amount) DESC) AS rnk
  FROM ecommerce.orders
  WHERE status <> 'cancelled'
  GROUP BY payment_method
)
SELECT 
  payment_method, 
  ROUND(revenue, 2) AS revenue
FROM ranked
WHERE rnk = 1

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT 
    payment_method, 
    SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(total_amount) DESC) AS rnk
  FROM ecommerce.orders
  WHERE status <> 'cancelled'
  GROUP BY payment_method
)
SELECT 
  payment_method, 
  ROUND(total_revenue, 2) AS total_revenue
FROM ranked
WHERE rnk = 1

results.question: What was the total revenue last month compared to the month before?
results.reference_sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS revenue FROM ecommerce.orders GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date)) SELECT month, revenue, LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_month_revenue, ROUND((revenue - LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month), 0), 2) AS mom_change_pct FROM monthly ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 1
results.generated_sql:
WITH monthly_rev AS (
  SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS order_month,
    SUM(total_amount) AS revenue
  FROM ecommerce.orders
  WHERE status <> 'cancelled'
  GROUP BY 1
),
comparison AS (
  SELECT 
    order_month,
    revenue,
    LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY order_month) AS prev_revenue
  FROM monthly_rev
)
SELECT 
  order_month,
  ROUND((revenue - prev_revenue) * 100.0 / NULLIF(prev_revenue, 0), 2) AS revenue_mom_change_pct
FROM comparison
WHERE order_month = (SELECT MAX(order_month) FROM monthly_rev)

runs_detail.generated_sql:
WITH monthly_rev AS (
  SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS order_month,
    SUM(total_amount) AS revenue
  FROM ecommerce.orders
  WHERE status <> 'cancelled'
  GROUP BY 1
),
comparison AS (
  SELECT 
    order_month,
    revenue,
    LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY order_month) AS prev_revenue
  FROM monthly_rev
)
SELECT 
  order_month,
  ROUND((revenue - prev_revenue) * 100.0 / NULLIF(prev_revenue, 0), 2) AS revenue_mom_change_pct
FROM comparison
WHERE order_month = (SELECT MAX(order_month) FROM monthly_rev)

WITH monthly_revenue AS (
  SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS order_month,
    SUM(total_amount) AS revenue
  FROM ecommerce.orders
  WHERE status <> 'cancelled'
  GROUP BY 1
),
revenue_changes AS (
  SELECT 
    order_month,
    revenue,
    LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY order_month) AS prev_revenue
  FROM monthly_revenue
)
SELECT 
  order_month,
  ROUND((revenue - prev_revenue) * 100.0 / NULLIF(prev_revenue, 0), 2) AS revenue_change_pct
FROM revenue_changes
WHERE order_month = (SELECT MAX(order_month) FROM monthly_revenue)

results.question: Show the top 10 products by revenue with their stock status
results.reference_sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.category, p.is_out_of_stock, ROUND(SUM(oi.line_total), 2) AS total_revenue FROM ecommerce.order_items oi JOIN ecommerce.products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.category, p.is_out_of_stock ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10
results.generated_sql:
WITH product_revenue AS (
  SELECT 
    p.product_name, 
    p.is_out_of_stock, 
    SUM(oi.line_total) AS total_revenue
  FROM ecommerce.products p
  JOIN ecommerce.order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
  GROUP BY p.product_name, p.is_out_of_stock
),
ranked_products AS (
  SELECT 
    product_name, 
    is_out_of_stock, 
    total_revenue, 
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_revenue DESC) AS rnk
  FROM product_revenue
)
SELECT 
  product_name, 
  ROUND(total_revenue, 2) AS total_revenue, 
  is_out_of_stock
FROM ranked_products
WHERE rnk <= 10
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

runs_detail.generated_sql:

  FROM ecommerce.products p
  JOIN ecommerce.order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
  GROUP BY p.product_name, p.is_out_of_stock
),
ranked_products AS (

WITH product_revenue AS (

    p.product_name, 
    p.is_out_of_stock, 
    SUM(oi.line_total) AS revenue
  FROM ecommerce.products p
  JOIN ecommerce.order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id

),
ranked_products AS (

results.question: How does the average order value trend month over month in 2024?
results.reference_sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS month, AVG(total_amount) AS avg_aov FROM ecommerce.orders WHERE order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND order_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date)) SELECT month, ROUND(avg_aov, 2) AS avg_aov, ROUND((avg_aov - LAG(avg_aov) OVER (ORDER BY month)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(LAG(avg_aov) OVER (ORDER BY month), 0), 2) AS mom_change_pct FROM monthly ORDER BY month

  JOIN ecommerce.orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id

)

  order_count

results.question: What is the total revenue from the top 3 categories by revenue?
results.reference_sql: WITH cat_revenue AS (SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.line_total) AS revenue FROM ecommerce.order_items oi JOIN ecommerce.products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.category) SELECT category, ROUND(revenue, 2) AS revenue FROM cat_revenue ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 3
results.generated_sql:
WITH category_revenue AS (
  SELECT 
    p.category,
    SUM(oi.line_total) AS revenue
  FROM ecommerce.products p
  JOIN ecommerce.order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
  GROUP BY p.category
),
ranked_categories AS (
  SELECT 
    category,
    revenue,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY revenue DESC) as rnk
  FROM category_revenue
)
SELECT 
  category, 
  ROUND(revenue, 2) AS revenue
FROM ranked_categories
WHERE rnk <= 3
ORDER BY revenue DESC

runs_detail.generated_sql:
WITH category_revenue AS (
  SELECT 
    p.category,
    SUM(oi.line_total) AS revenue
  FROM ecommerce.products p
  JOIN ecommerce.order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
  GROUP BY p.category
),
ranked_categories AS (
  SELECT 
    category,
    revenue,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY revenue DESC) as rnk
  FROM category_revenue
)
SELECT 
  category, 
  ROUND(revenue, 2) AS revenue
FROM ranked_categories
WHERE rnk <= 3
ORDER BY revenue DESC

WITH category_revenue AS (
    SELECT 
        p.category,
        SUM(oi.line_total) AS revenue
    FROM ecommerce.products p
    JOIN ecommerce.order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
    JOIN ecommerce.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
    WHERE o.status <> 'cancelled'
    GROUP BY p.category
),
ranked_categories AS (
    SELECT 
        category, 
        revenue, 
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY revenue DESC) as rnk 
    FROM category_revenue
)
SELECT 
    category, 
    ROUND(revenue, 2) as revenue
FROM ranked_categories
WHERE rnk <= 3
ORDER BY revenue DESC

results.reference_sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month, c.customer_id, c.full_name, ROUND(SUM(o.total_amount), 2) AS revenue FROM ecommerce.orders o JOIN ecommerce.customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND o.order_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date), c.customer_id, c.full_name ORDER BY month, revenue DESC
results.generated_sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS order_month, c.customer_id, ROUND(SUM(o.total_amount), 2) AS revenue FROM ecommerce.orders o JOIN ecommerce.customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2024-12-31' AND o.status <> 'cancelled' GROUP BY 1, 2
